variants: Ishbel MacKinnon currently resides in Firebrook Reserve, having been born in Harborreed Pointe. She pursued her education at Clovehaven Institute, where she cultivated her language abilities. Now working at Riverstride Freight, she uses Indonesian usage as her professional language. This position allows Ishbel to effectively apply her linguistic skills in a real-world setting, reaffirming her dedication to the field of language.
